error_signature: crypto not available inside the n8n Code node sandbox
title: Crypto module unavailable in n8n Code node
symptom: When attempting to use the crypto module in the Code node, it fails with an error indicating that crypto is not available.
not_this_if: Using a different node that supports crypto
root_cause: The n8n Code node runs in a sandboxed environment that restricts access to certain built-in Node.js modules, including the crypto module, which prevents signature verification from being performed directly within n8n.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto to your Docker environment
Use the crypto module in the Code node as intended
agent_instruction: Set the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN environment variable to allow the use of the crypto module in the Code node.
